title: Day 1

description: Dancehall vibes to boost your energy; no equipment, just good moves and good vibes.

description: Follow along, move your way, and feel good. All levels welcome, no pressure.

subtitle: 15 Min of Missy-Inspired Energy Home Exercise
description: Quick, fun, and full of fire! Press play, flip it, and vibe through every move.

description: Throwback beats, dancehall moves. Just press play and move.

description: High-energy HIIT that's actually fun! All levels, all vibes.

title: Day 1
subtitle: 50 Min Beat the Weight Home Walking Exercise
description: Start strong with a full-body walk. No pressure, just press play, move, and lock in your first 25 points.

title: Day 2
subtitle: Hit 3,000 Steps from Home in 30 Mins
description: Back-to-back days? Big win. This short, punchy walk keeps you on track and your points climbing.

title: Day 3
subtitle: 40 Min 4,000-Step Groove Walking Exercise
description: Feel-good steps that add up. Every minute gets you closer to your goal and your next reward.

title: Day 4
subtitle: 45 Min Work off the Weight Home Exercise
description: All standing, all doable. You'll be surprised how good this one feels by the end.

title: Day 5
subtitle: 40 Min Walk Plus Sweat Reset Home Exercise
description: A do-it-anytime walk. Perfect for that "I almost didn't work out today" kind of day.

title: Day 6
subtitle: 30 Min Step Up and Walk It Out Exercise
description: Nothing fancy —just a solid, feel-good walk to get your steps in and boost your energy.

title: Day 7
subtitle: 30 Min Fat Burning Home Exercise
description: Short and snappy. Perfect for mornings, midday slumps, or a quick comeback.

title: Day 8
subtitle: 60 Min Fast Home Walking Exercise
description: A full-hour vibe to walk, reset, and feel like you did something today.

title: Day 9
subtitle: 40 Min Power Pace Home Walkout
description: This one moves fast! No fluff, just focused energy and points that add up.

title: Day 10
subtitle: 30 Min Core + Confidence Walkout
description: It's Day 10. You showed up, you stacked your steps, and you did that. This one's a victory lap.

subtitle: 19-Min Afrobeat Gospel Dance Home Workout

title: Day 7
subtitle: 17-Min Dance Cardio for Beginners
description: Only 17 minutes, but all the good vibes! Turn "just a quick workout" into your favorite part of the day.

title: Day 1
subtitle: Full Body Banded Burn – Upper + Lower
description: A full body routine using one band to target thighs, glutes, back, arms, and core. Great burn with minimal equipment.

title: Day 2
subtitle: Full Body Dumbbell Toning Workout (Fun Vibes!)
description: Full body dumbbell workout with fun music to keep you motivated while toning your entire body.

title: Day 3
subtitle: Dance Workout That Hits Your Waist HARD
description: Get ready to sweat for real in this upbeat, waist-snatching workout that blends core sculpting with total body strength and a splash of dance energy.

title: Day 4
subtitle: Full Body Dumbbell Burn
description: Butterfly squats, curls, presses, rows, and Azonto step combos for an intense full body burn.

title: Day 5
subtitle: Low Impact Afro Dance Workout – Sweat & Tone
description: Afro dance flow with abs, arms, and waist moves. Sweat without jumping. Great for low impact days.

title: Day 6
subtitle: Low Impact Upper Body Dumbbell Workout
description: Focuses on arms, shoulders, and back with no jumping – just pure controlled upper body burn.

title: Day 7
subtitle: Standing Abs Workout with Dumbbell – No Floor Work!
description: Standing abs workout with dumbbell resistance. Targets core, shoulders, and obliques while staying on your feet.

title: Day 8
subtitle: Full Body Dumbbell Toning Workout – Lower & Upper Burn
description: Lower and upper body dumbbell workout with squats, lunges, curls, presses, and rows.

title: Day 9
subtitle: Afrobeat Circuit Training Workout – Dumbbells & Kettlebell
description: Circuit training with Afrobeat dance moves, dumbbell circuits, and kettlebell combos.

title: Day 10
subtitle: Dance & Dumbbells Workout – Arms, Shoulders, Back & Fun Cardio
description: Dance cardio blended with arms, shoulders, and back toning for a fun, sweaty session.

title: Day 11
subtitle: Glute Focused Workout – Dumbbell & Bodyweight Booty Burn
description: Glute focused workout with lunges, kickbacks, sumo squats, and curtsy lunges for serious booty burn.

title: Day 12
subtitle: Dance HIIT Workout with Dumbbells – Full Body Burn & Fun Cardio
description: HIIT style dance workout with dumbbell moves, cardio bursts, and full body toning for max calorie burn.

title: Day 13
subtitle: Afro-Soca Vibes Cardio Dance Workout – Sweat & Burn
description: Fun Caribbean and African vibes with waist grooves, booty belts, crunches, and feel-good moves. No heavy impact – just pure sweat, smiles, and energy.

title: Day 14
subtitle: Low Impact Dance HIIT Workout – Freestyle Afrobeat Burn
description: A low impact dance HIIT workout with Afrobeat vibes. Perfect if you want to sweat, tone your body, and vibe to the music with no jumping or rigid choreography.
